content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
RISK-ON: low volatility (Vol: 18.2%) with broad participation (Breadth: 7/8 sectors positive), driving a broad rally led by banks and cyclicals.

2. Which sectors are leading?
Banking & Finance ABOVE TREND: AKBNK (1W: +10.99% | 1M: +6.22%) ABOVE TREND, GARAN (1W: +11.07% | 1M: +5.27%) ABOVE TREND; Transportation ABOVE TREND: TAVHL (1W: +7.67% | 1M: +20.17%) ABOVE TREND; Heavy Industry ABOVE TREND: ASELS (1W: +13.11% | 1M: +13.56%) ABOVE TREND.

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Technology & Telecom is the clear laggard: KONTR (1W: -7.41% | 1M: -3.26%) BELOW TREND; select heavy industrials show fatigue with FROTO (1W: -0.68% | 1M: -3.31%) BELOW TREND and TOASO (1W: -0.46% | 1M: +0.33%) CORRECTION.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
ASELS (1W: +13.11% | 1M: +13.56%) ABOVE TREND, GARAN (1W: +11.07% | 1M: +5.27%) ABOVE TREND, AKBNK (1W: +10.99% | 1M: +6.22%) ABOVE TREND, YKBNK (1W: +9.57% | 1M: +7.56%) ABOVE TREND, VAKBN (1W: +8.70% | 1M: -3.93%) RECOVERY.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
KONTR (1W: -7.41% | 1M: -3.26%) BELOW TREND, GUBRF (1W: -1.63% | 1M: -1.02%) BELOW TREND, TUPRS (1W: -1.08% | 1M: +4.41%) CORRECTION, DOHOL (1W: -1.07% | 1M: +1.70%) CORRECTION, FROTO (1W: -0.68% | 1M: -3.31%) BELOW TREND.

6. Momentum Stocks?
ASELS (1W: +13.11% | 1M: +13.56%) ABOVE TREND, GARAN (1W: +11.07% | 1M: +5.27%) ABOVE TREND, AKBNK (1W: +10.99% | 1M: +6.22%) ABOVE TREND, YKBNK (1W: +9.57% | 1M: +7.56%) ABOVE TREND, ISCTR (1W: +8.14% | 1M: +4.42%) ABOVE TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Banking & Finance is driving the market; AKBNK (1W: +10.99% | 1M: +6.22%) ABOVE TREND, GARAN (1W: +11.07% | 1M: +5.27%) ABOVE TREND, ISCTR (1W: +8.14% | 1M: +4.42%) ABOVE TREND while VAKBN (1W: +8.70% | 1M: -3.93%) is a short-term RECOVERY—favor overweight on large-cap banks.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Heavy Industry shows bifurcation: ASELS (1W: +13.11% | 1M: +13.56%) ABOVE TREND and KRDMD (1W: +7.17% | 1M: +15.76%) ABOVE TREND lead, while FROTO (1W: -0.68% | 1M: -3.31%) BELOW TREND and TOASO (1W: -0.46% | 1M: +0.33%) CORRECTION signal stock-specific risk.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Energy is constructive but mixed: TUPRS (1W: -1.08% | 1M: +4.41%) CORRECTION, PETKM (quant-positive) (1W: +? | 1M: +?) NOTE: prioritize higher-quant names; GUBRF (1W: -1.63% | 1M: -1.02%) BELOW TREND—watch oil price direction and refining margins. 

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Overweight Banking & Finance and select cyclicals (ASELS, KRDMD, TAVHL) to ride the broad risk-on; trim positions in stretched winners and lagging tech (KONTR) while keeping hedges for policy or global risk spikes.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
ASELS (1W: +13.11% | 1M: +13.56%) ABOVE TREND, AKBNK (1W: +10.99% | 1M: +6.22%) ABOVE TREND, KRDMD (1W: +7.17% | 1M: +15.76%) ABOVE TREND, TAVHL (1W: +7.67% | 1M: +20.17%) ABOVE TREND, KONTR (1W: -7.41% | 1M: -3.26%) BELOW TREND for potential mean-reversion.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Banking & Finance for leadership continuity; Transportation for momentum and earnings/traffic updates; Heavy Industry for earnings and commodity sensitivity.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Watch XU100 momentum around recent intraday highs for breakout continuation; key catalysts are CBRT policy/comments, global risk appetite, commodity prices and upcoming company earnings—any hawkish policy surprise or global risk-off could flip RISK-ON quickly.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
Risk-on backdrop (Vol 18.2%, Breadth 7/8) favors large-cap banks and cyclicals; ASELS and banking names lead while tech (KONTR) lags. Primary risks are policy shocks or global risk repricing; tactical overweight on banking and select industrials with disciplined profit-taking recommended.
